rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §44.032, which governs criminal penalties for school district purchasing violations. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An officer, employee, or agent of a school district commits an offense if the person with criminal negligence makes or authorizes separate, sequential, or component purchases to avoid the requirements of Section 44.031(a) or (b).
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §44.032 addresses school district procurement enforcement and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
